title: Yellow
why_this_song: Short, repetitive lines with basic color + nature vocabulary. A gentle introduction to past simple ('came') and present simple narration.

vocab_hooks.note: color; used as a mood word in the song

grammar_callouts: look at the stars / look how they shine — imperative + how-clause

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in the opening line:
exercises.prompt_pt: Complete a lacuna no verso inicial:
exercises.blank_hint: plural — bright things in the night sky
exercises.excerpt_after: , look how they shine for you

exercises.teacher_note: Past-simple 'were' — review of 'to be' conjugation in the past. Plural agreement with 'stars'.

exercises.prompt_en: The singer uses 'yellow' to describe a feeling. What color describes how you feel today and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor usa 'amarelo' para descrever um sentimento. Que cor descreve como você se sente hoje e por quê?

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** Exceptionally simple vocabulary makes this a low-risk first song. Focus on pronunciation of 'yellow' (/ˈjɛləʊ/) — the 'y' consonant + 'ow' diphthong is tricky for PT speakers.
